ab: Nga’ayho, o maan ko a’acaen iso?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Mi’aca kako to cecay a kokpo.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Nga’ayho? O maan ko a’acaen iso?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: Mi’aca kako to cecay a kafong.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Mi’aca kako to kokpo, miliwalay kiso haw?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Iraay, pina ko a’acaen iso.
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: Miliwalay kiso to ’icep haw?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: Awaay, cowa kapiliwal kako to ’icep.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: Mi’aca kako to felac.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: Pina a lofoc ko ’acaen iso?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Pafelien kako to tolo a lofoc.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: Mi’aca kako to konga.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Maeminayto a maliwal ko konga.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: Mi’aca kako to simal tosa a talid.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: Cecayto a talid ko ’osaw.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: Olili patadoen kako a mi’aca to fita’ol.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: Pina a tingting ko ’acaen iso.
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: Pina a tingting ko ’acaen iso a fita’ol?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: Tosa a tingting ko ’acaen ako.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Mi’aca kako to tosa a falod no kenaw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: Toloayto kona ’osaw, emin han ako a pafeli kiso.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: Hakowaay ko ’aca nona cecay lofoc no felac?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Tosa a so’ot no payso ko cecay lofoc.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: O emin i tosapolo’ ira ko cecay a rimood. tosaen aca a polo’ a rimood.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: Ahowiday.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: Onini siwa a polo’ ira ko lima a rimood.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Tongalen to miming. Sacecay han a so’ot a rimood.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: O emin lima a so’ot ira ko motep a rimood.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Limaen aca a so’ot a rimood haw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: ’atekakay tato, nga’ay saka emeden to miming haw?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: Cowa ka nga’ay, o saka emedayto koni.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: Maolah kako tona ’odax.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: O na odax tolo a polo’ a rimood. iraho ko roma a kangalayan iso?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
